name: Super Buckyball Tournament Preseason
short_description: Super Buckyball Tournament Preseason is currently offline. Please join us again in early February 2021 for another round of SBT!
detailed_description:
ADD FULL GAME TO YOUR WISHLIST


About the Game

Join Our Discord




Announcement
Super Buckyball Tournament Preseason has ended on December 6th and the game is no longer available. We have met a lot of new friends over this beta and we have gotten a lot of support from many of our old friends. And we want to thank you all for joining the SBT Preseason project.
We have also received a lot of feedback which will help us make the game stronger before the planned launch next summer. In the meantime, we will be having a few more rounds of testing, with the first one in early February.
So, make sure you wishlist the full game, because that is where all the future games will go down (see the link above)
And of course also join our community on discord to see how the game is progressing and get all the sneak peaks and join our other activities:

So that's it for the preseason. See you soon for the next game!


Feedback:
We welcome all players to act as members of our development team and experience the game as it is being developed; we will do our best to make adjustments according to your suggestions. All feedback can be directed to our email: sbt@pathea.net

Join Our Social Media
